---
title: "Adeyeye Seyi Joseph"
subtitle: "Data Analyst | Writer | Administrator"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: ade.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Crystal-analytics
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adeyeye-seyi-3124a213b/
---

Adeyeye Seyi Joseph is a data analyst, public administrator, lover of beautiful visualizations and a researcher. I love issues-based politics, value-driven statesmanship and people-centric leadership.

## Education

University of Ilorin, Ilorin \| Kwara State \| Nigeria

## Experience

Policy Innovation Centre(PIC) \| Data Analyst \| 


## Tools Stack

-   Microsoft Excel

-   Microsoft Power BI

-   SQL

-   R

-   Python




## Domains & Interests

-   Sales & Finance Analytics(Business Intelligence)

-   Health Analytics

-   Humanitarian Data Analytics

-   Operations & Supply-chain Analytics

-   Academic & Corporate Research
